comments.body:
Hi Touseef,



Thank you for your help. But one thing is, every time I export the products, some information (dimension, Customs Description, etc) of the old styles disappeared. And I need to fill in again. Yesterday I only add the new styles and no change for the old ones. Then today the PH app cannot recognize some dimensions and divided some order into 2 packages.



I again updated all styles, please upload attached file for us today.





Thanks.



Best Regards,

Carrie
comments.html_body:
Hi Touseef,

 

Thank you for your help. But one thing is, every time I export the products, some information (dimension, Customs Description, etc) of the old styles disappeared. And I need to fill in again. Yesterday I only add the new styles and no change for the old ones. Then today the PH app cannot recognize some dimensions and divided some order into 2 packages.

 

I again updated all styles, please upload attached file for us today.

 

 

Thanks.

 

Best Regards,

Carrie

comments.body:
Hello Carrie Cheung,

Thank you for your response.

Before I go ahead and import the new file in the app, could you please share a couple of products for which this case happened, so that I can check and verify the product details in the app once the new file is imported?

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.html_body:
Hi Touseef,

 

You can see order #128379

 

The Joyeux and Burleigh are in different package. It happens after you uploaded my previous product excel file.

 

After you uploaded attached latest excel, you can export all MARCUSE products, you will see some dimension and customs description disappears for several styles.

 

 

  

 

Thanks.

comments.body:
Hello Carrie,

Thank you for your response.

I have checked the Order 128379 and could observe that following -

- **Before CSV import -**
  - Joyeux - Joyeux Melon / M: 32 – 34 inch (80-85 cm) has dimensions in the app.
  - Burleigh - Burleigh Blue / M: 32 – 34 inch (80-85 cm) does not have dimensions in the app.
- **After CSV import -**
  - Joyeux - Joyeux Melon / M: 32 – 34 inch (80-85 cm) has dimensions in the app.
  - Burleigh - Burleigh Blue / M: 32 – 34 inch (80-85 cm) has dimensions in the app.

Also, after refreshing the order in the app after importing the CSV, I could observe that both the products are now packed in the same package.

Additionally, I exported a new CSV file and could observe that the products are updated with dimensions in the file as well.

You can cross check and let us know if you have any further queries.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Carrie,
 
Thank you for your response.
 
I have checked the Order 128379 and could observe that following - 
  • Before CSV import -
    • Joyeux - Joyeux Melon / M: 32 – 34 inch (80-85 cm) has dimensions in the app.
    • Burleigh - Burleigh Blue / M: 32 – 34 inch (80-85 cm) does not have dimensions in the app.
  • After CSV import -
    • Joyeux - Joyeux Melon / M: 32 – 34 inch (80-85 cm) has dimensions in the app.
    • Burleigh - Burleigh Blue / M: 32 – 34 inch (80-85 cm) has dimensions in the app.
 
Also, after refreshing the order in the app after importing the CSV, I could observe that both the products are now packed in the same package.
 
Additionally, I exported a new CSV file and could observe that the products are updated with dimensions in the file as well.
 
You can cross check and let us know if you have any further queries.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
